settings.title: Returns & exchanges
settings.body:
We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If something isn't right, we're here to help.

Return window: Items may be returned within 30 days of delivery in unused condition with original tags attached.

How to start a return: Contact our team at Contact us with your order number and reason for return.

Refunds: Approved returns are refunded to the original payment method within 5–10 business days after we receive the item.
